zh.Somerleyton, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可索莫利頓
zh.Somerleyton, Suffolk, England, United Ki: 英國英格蘭素福爾可索莫利頓
zh.Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可格亞特 亞爾姆斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Jernegan於1410年出生在英國諾福爾可格亞特 亞爾姆斯時，他的父親Sir Thomas Jernegan30歲，母親Joan Appleyard17歲。他於大約1430年與Lady Agnes Jane Darrell在英國肯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1474年12月9日在英國賀特福爾享年64歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可索莫利頓。

zh-hans.Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可格亞特 亞爾姆斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Jernegan于1410年出生在英国諾福爾可格亞特 亞爾姆斯时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Jernegan30岁，母亲Joan Appleyard17岁。他于大约1430年与Lady Agnes Jane Darrell在英国肯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1474年12月9日在英国賀特福爾享年64岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可索莫利頓。

nameMeanings.name: Jernegan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Suffolk): of uncertain origin. Reaney believes it to be of Breton origin, probably identical with the Old Breton personal name Iarnuuocon ‘iron famous’, taken to East Anglia by Bretons at the time of the Norman Conquest. Compare Journigan .
History: Thomas Jernigan was granted land at Somerton, VA, in 1668. Many of his descendants were sea captains. His son, also called Thomas, settled on Martha's Vineyard, MA, in 1712.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Jernegan was born in 1410, in Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir Thomas Jernegan, was 30 and his mother, Joan Appleyard, was 17. He married Lady Agnes Jane Darrell about 1430, in Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 9 December 1474, in Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Somerleyton, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Jernegan est né en 1410, à Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Jernegan, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Joan Appleyard, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Lady Agnes Jane Darrell environ 1430, à Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 9 décembre 1474, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Somerleyton, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Jernegan 1410 in Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Jernegan 30 und seine Mutter Joan Appleyard 17. Er hat um 1430 in Kent, England Lady Agnes Jane Darrell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Dezember 1474 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Somerleyton, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Jernegan è nato il nel 1410 nel Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Jernegan, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Joan Appleyard, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Lady Agnes Jane Darrell circa 1430, nel Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 9 dicembre 1474, nel Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Somerleyton, Suffolk, England.

ja.Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクグレアト ヤーモウス
ja.lifeSummary: John Jerneganが1410年にイギリスノーフォルクグレアト ヤーモウスで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Jerneganは30歳，母Joan Appleyardは17歳であった。約1430年にイギリスケントでLady Agnes Jane Darrellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1474年12月9日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアで64歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクソメルリートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Jernegan(이)가 1410년 영국 노르폴크 그리트 야모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Jernegan(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Appleyard(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1430년 영국 켄트에서 Lady Agnes Jane Darrell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1474년 12월 9일 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 서머리턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Jernegan nasceu em 1410, em Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Jernegan, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Joan Appleyard, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Agnes Jane Darrell aproximadamente 1430, em Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de dezembro de 1474, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Somerleyton, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Jernegan родился в 1410 г. в местности грит ярмоут, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Jernegan было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Appleyard, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Agnes Jane Darrell около 1430 г. в местности кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 9 декабря 1474 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности сомирлитон, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Jernegan nació en 1410, en Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Jernegan, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Joan Appleyard, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Lady Agnes Jane Darrell aproximadamente 1430, en Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 9 de diciembre de 1474, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Somerleyton, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
